hero.title: Clear guidance for every family, in every language.
hero.description: Ethiospectrum helps families organize important documents, understand complicated information, and track their next steps in English, Amharic, or Spanish.
hero.trust: Built for information, organization, and practical next steps.
hero.galleryTitle: Every family story deserves room to grow.
hero.galleryDescription: A welcoming space for the everyday moments, questions, and milestones that shape a family’s path.
hero.classroomAlt: Children learning together in a classroom
hero.learningAlt: A child practicing a new skill
hero.journeyTitle: Small steps can carry a family forward.
hero.journeyDescription: Ethiospectrum makes room for each family’s pace, questions, and progress.
hero.journeyAlt: A child running outside on a sunny day

howItWorks.title: Bring the pieces of family care into one clear place.
howItWorks.stepOneDescription: Keep important records and family details together in a future private binder.
howItWorks.stepTwoDescription: Use plain-language explanations and clearly labeled information to prepare for decisions.
howItWorks.stepThreeDescription: Track next steps, dates, questions, and useful resources at your own pace.

features.title: Structure without the overwhelm.
features.documentsDescription: A planned secure home for records, paperwork, and important details.
features.assistantDescription: A planned tool for cited, plain-language document guidance—never a substitute for a professional.
features.roadmapDescription: A planned space for deadlines, questions, and manageable next steps.
features.resourcesDescription: Curated educational resources in the language that works for your family.

multilingual.eyebrow: Language should not be a barrier
multilingual.title: Choose the language that feels most natural.
multilingual.description: The foundation supports English, Amharic, and Spanish. Translation content is reviewed carefully before it is relied on for sensitive decisions.

documentAssistant.title: Questions deserve grounded answers.
documentAssistant.description: This planned assistant will distinguish document facts, general information, suggested next steps, and what it could not verify.
documentAssistant.notice: Document analysis is not active in this foundation.

digitalBinder.title: A place for the papers that matter.
digitalBinder.description: A future private binder will help your household keep records organized without turning files into a maze.

roadmap.title: Make the next step visible.
roadmap.description: A future roadmap will turn important dates and questions into a clear, flexible plan.

resources.title: Information that meets families where they are.
resources.description: Explore early educational resources while our reviewed library grows.
resources.resourceThree: Questions to bring to an appointment
resources.pageIntro: Browse educational material designed to help families prepare, organize, and ask informed questions.

privacy.title: Sensitive information deserves careful boundaries.
privacy.description: Ethiospectrum is being designed around private storage, server-side authorization, auditability, and minimal data use. This is an architecture commitment, not a compliance claim.
privacy.pageIntro: This draft describes product intentions and requires legal, privacy, and security review before any public launch.

pricing.title: Thoughtful support, with details to come.
pricing.description: Pricing and paid support are not available in this foundation. We will share clear options before any subscription service launches.
pricing.planDescription: No charge or purchase is available today.

callToAction.title: A more organized path starts with a clearer view.
callToAction.description: Explore the Ethiospectrum foundation and see how family guidance can become easier to navigate.

footer.description: Multilingual family-support foundation for organization, education, and next steps.

authentication.loginDescription: Sign-in is prepared for a future Supabase connection.
authentication.signupDescription: Account creation is not connected in this foundation.
authentication.notReady: Authentication integration is not connected yet. No account is created or signed in.

dashboard.intro: This is sample content showing how a future household dashboard may be organized.

emptyStates.documentsTitle: Your binder is ready when you are
emptyStates.documentsDescription: Document upload and processing are planned for a later phase.
emptyStates.assistantTitle: Ask about a document when analysis is available
emptyStates.assistantDescription: The future assistant will show sources and page citations for supported answers.
emptyStates.roadmapDescription: Future reminders and deadlines will appear here.
emptyStates.dependentsDescription: Household profiles are planned for a later phase.
emptyStates.supportDescription: Human support and appointments are not connected yet.

errors.notFoundTitle: We could not find that page
errors.notFoundDescription: The page may have moved, or the address may be incomplete.
errors.protectedDescription: This area is reserved for authenticated users. Authentication is not connected in this foundation.

marketingPages.featuresIntro: See the planned tools and the safety boundaries guiding their design.
marketingPages.howItWorksIntro: Ethiospectrum is designed to help families move from scattered information to understandable next steps.
marketingPages.termsIntro: These draft terms explain the boundaries of this early product foundation and need professional review.

legal.draftNotice: Draft content for professional review — it does not state legal compliance.
legal.privacyBody: Ethiospectrum is intended to collect only what is needed for its services, protect private family information, and provide meaningful controls. Final policies, retention periods, and legal obligations will be reviewed before launch.
legal.termsBody: Ethiospectrum provides educational, informational, and organizational support. It does not provide legal, medical, immigration, or professional advice, representation, eligibility decisions, or guaranteed outcomes.

member.logoutNotice: Logout will be available when authentication is connected.
member.onboardingDescription: Guided household setup is planned. Nothing is saved in this foundation.
member.settingsDescription: Language, profile, and household settings will be available after authentication is connected.

admin.title: Administration workspace
admin.description: This separate shell establishes a future server-side role boundary. Administrative actions are unavailable in the foundation.

protected.developmentNotice: Protected routes are intentionally unavailable until real server-side authentication is connected.

review.translation: Translation requires native-speaker review before use for sensitive content.
